commands.review_summary:
Adds a new agent-safety regression evaluator, tests, report-generation script, package scripts, and a report-only OpenClaw Release Checks job.

PR surface: Source +296, Tests +53, Config +41, Other +122. Total +512 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new security/QA gate rather than a reported bug. The review path is workflow/source inspection plus after-patch report or artifact proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor real behavior proof plus secops/release-owner review before any repair or merge automation should touch it.

target.title: Add report-only agent safety regression gate
target.body:
## What
Adds a deterministic RAMPART-style agent safety regression harness for OpenClaw incidents, covering agent overreach, prompt injection, credential access, and destructive-action scenarios. Wires it into OpenClaw Release Checks as a report-only QA artifact.

## Why
Agent safety incidents need repeatable CI coverage instead of one-off reports. This converts the report-only safety scenarios into runnable pass/fail cases while keeping the release gate non-blocking for initial observation.

## How
- Adds typed scenario/candidate/evaluator primitives under `src/security/agent-safety-regression.ts`.
- Adds Vitest regression coverage for safe and unsafe traces.
- Adds `agent-safety:report` JSON/Markdown artifact generation.
- Adds a `continue-on-error` OpenClaw Release Checks job for the `all` and `qa` rerun groups.

## Testing
Rebased on current `origin/main` at `5691a4f412`.

Passed:
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.unit-security.config.ts src/security/agent-safety-regression.test.ts` -> 10 passed
- `node --import tsx scripts/agent-safety-regression-report.ts --check` -> 4/4 passed
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/security/agent-safety-regression.ts src/security/agent-safety-regression.test.ts scripts/agent-safety-regression-report.ts package.json .github/workflows/openclaw-release-checks.yml` -> passed
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/security/agent-safety-regression.ts src/security/agent-safety-regression.test.ts` -> 0 warnings/errors
- `OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.scripts.json scripts/agent-safety-regression-report.ts` -> 0 warnings/errors

Local environment / current-main caveats:
- `pnpm ...` wrapper now attempts a non-interactive reinstall/purge of the shared linked `node_modules`; direct underlying commands were used instead.
- `pnpm check:workflows` cannot run locally because this host has neither `actionlint` nor `go`; PR Workflow Sanity CI is running actionlint.
- Broader type prep/typecheck fails on current `main` before this patch, with missing `@earendil-works/pi-tui`, `@openclaw/proxyline`, `rastermill`, and related existing typing errors outside the new safety files.

## Checklist
- [x] Tests added/updated
- [x] No schema changes
- [x] Report-only gate, no deploy/runtime mutation
target.author: martins-oss
